Title: Successful registered
Preconditions: N/A
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Register with Google'
Expected Result: User is registered and redirect to edit profile page

Title: Registered user try to register again
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Register with Google'
Expected Result: System identifies the user and redirects to home page (No duplicate account created)

Title: Successful login
Preconditions: User is registered
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Sign in with Google'
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to home page

Title: Cancel Google Authentication
Preconditions: User is on the login page
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Sign in with Google'
2. Close or cancel the Google popup
Expected Result: User is not authenticated; returns to login page.

Title: Set unique account name
Preconditions: User is authenticated and on edit profile page
Test Steps:
1. Enter a unique account name
2. Click Save
Expected Result: Profile name is saved successfully.

Title: Set duplicate account name
Preconditions: Account name 'InklyFan99' already exists in DB
Test Steps:
1. Enter existing account name
2. Click Save
Expected Result: System rejects name and displays 'Account name already exists' error.

Title: Set already existed interest tag in profile
Preconditions: User is authenticated and on edit profile page
Test Steps:
1. Search for interest tag
2. Select interest tag
3. Click Save
Expected Result: User set their interest tag for their profile

Title: Set profile picture
Preconditions: User is authenticated and on edit profile page
Test Steps:
1. Upload image file of profile picture
2. Click Save
Expected Result: User set image as their profile picture

Title: Upload with agreement checked
Preconditions: User is creating a post with an attachment  for the first time
Test Steps:
1. Attach file
2. Check the 'File Ownership Agreement' box
3. Submit post
Expected Result: Post with attachment is published successfully.

Title: Upload without agreement checked
Preconditions: User is creating a post with an attachment for the first time
Test Steps:
1. Attach file
2. Leave the 'File Ownership Agreement' box unchecked
3. Click Submit
Expected Result: Submission blocked; system prompts user to check the agreement box.

Title: Create text post without forum selection
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Enter post title and text
2. Do NOT select a forum category
3. Click Publish
Expected Result: Publish fails; validation error requesting forum selection.

Title: Post character limit - Exact boundary
Preconditions: User is authenticated, valid forum selected
Test Steps:
1. Enter exactly 5000 characters in post body
2. Click Publish
Expected Result: Post is published successfully.

Title: Post character limit - Exceeded
Preconditions: User is authenticated, valid forum selected
Test Steps:
1. Enter 5001 characters in post body
2. Click Publish
Expected Result: Publish blocked; error message regarding max 5000 characters.

Title: Set already existed tag in post
Preconditions: User is creating a post
Test Steps:
1. Search  tag
2. Select tag
3. Click Save
Expected Result: User attached tag to their post

Title: Auto-create non-existent tag
Preconditions: User is authenticated, creating post
Test Steps:
1. Enter a completely new tag name
2. Publish post
Expected Result: Post published; new tag is created in global database.

Title: Admin create tag
Preconditions: Admin is authenticated and viewing admin interface
Test Steps:
1. Enter a completely new tag name
2. Click Save
Expected Result: New tag is created in global database.

Title: Admin merge tag
Preconditions: Admin is authenticated and viewing admin interface
Test Steps:
1. Select two or more tag
2. Click Merge
Expected Result: New tag is created in global database. All the content under old tag change to new tag, Delete old tag in global database

Title: Image size limit - Exact boundary
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Attach an image exactly 5.0 MB in size
2. Submit
Expected Result: File uploads and attaches successfully.

Title: Image size limit - Exceeded
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps: 1. Attach an image 5.1 MB in size
Expected Result: Upload blocked immediately; file size error displayed.

Title: Invalid file format upload
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps: 1. Attach an executable file
Expected Result: Upload rejected; system displays invalid file type error.

Title: File size limit - Exact boundary
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Attach a file exactly 20.0 MB in size
2. Submit
Expected Result: File uploads and attaches successfully.

Title: File size limit - Exceeded
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps: 1. Attach a file 20.1 MB in size
Expected Result: Upload blocked immediately; file size error displayed.

Title: Edit own post
Preconditions: User is viewing their own published post
Test Steps:
1. Click Edit
2. Modify text
3. Click Save
Expected Result: Post updates successfully and displays modified content.

Title: Edit someone else's post
Preconditions: User A is logged in and viewing User B's post
Test Steps:
1. Look for Edit button
2. Try to force Edit via URL manipulation
Test Data: Target Post ID belonging to User B
Expected Result: Edit button is hidden; URL manipulation returns 403 Forbidden.

Title: Delete own post
Preconditions: User is viewing their own published post
Test Steps: 1. Click Delete
Expected Result: Post Delete sucessfully

Title: Delete someone else's post
Preconditions: User A is logged in and viewing User B's post
Test Steps:
1. Look for Delete button
2. Try to force Delete via URL manipulation
Test Data: Target Post ID belonging to User B
Expected Result: Delete button is hidden; URL manipulation returns 403 Forbidden.

Title: Admin delete post
Preconditions: Admin is viewing User A's post
Test Steps: 1. Click Delete
Test Data: Appended text: 'Deleted', Target Post ID belonging to User B
Expected Result: Post Delete sucessfully

Title: Delete own comment
Preconditions: User is viewing their own published comment
Test Steps: 1. Click Delete
Expected Result: Comment Delete sucessfully

Title: Delete someone else's comment
Preconditions: User A is logged in and viewing User B's comment
Test Steps:
1. Look for Delete button
2. Try to force Delete via URL manipulation
Test Data: Target Comment ID belonging to User B
Expected Result: Delete button is hidden; URL manipulation returns 403 Forbidden.

Title: Admin delete comment
Preconditions: Admin is viewing User A's comment
Test Steps: 1. Click Delete
Test Data: Appended text: 'Deleted', Target Comment ID belonging to User B
Expected Result: Comment Delete sucessfully

Title: Comment character limit - Exact boundary
Preconditions: User is authenticated, viewing a post
Test Steps:
1. Enter exactly 1000 characters in comment box
2. Click Post Comment
Expected Result: Comment is appended to the post successfully.

Title: Comment character limit - Exceeded
Preconditions: User is authenticated, viewing a post
Test Steps:
1. Enter 1001 characters in comment box
2. Click Post Comment
Expected Result: Submission blocked; error message regarding max 1000 characters.

Title: Search post
Preconditions: User viewing search bar
Test Steps: 1. Enter keyword
Expected Result: Found the post that match keyword

Title: Filter Post
Preconditions: User viewing filter bar
Test Steps:
1. Search tag
2. Select tag
Expected Result: Found the post attached with tag selected

Title: Sort Post
Preconditions: User viewing sort bar
Test Steps: 1. Select sort option
Expected Result: Reorder the displayed list of posts based on selected option

Title: Search follower
Preconditions: User viewing followed page and open search bar
Test Steps: 1. User A enter User B name
Test Data: User database, User A follow User B
Expected Result: Found User B account

Title: Search bookmark
Preconditions: User viewing bookmark page and open search bar
Test Steps: 1. Enter keyword of Post A
Test Data: Post database, User bookmark Post A
Expected Result: Found Post A

Title: Follow user
Preconditions: User viewing other user's profile page
Test Steps: 1. Click follow
Expected Result: User A follow User B. User B appear in User A followed list.

Title: Unfollow user
Preconditions: User viewing other user's profile page
Test Steps: 1. Click unfollow
Test Data: User A already follow User B
Expected Result: User A unfolllow User B. User B remove from User A followed list

Title: Bookmark post
Preconditions: User viewing post
Test Steps: 1. Click bookmark
Expected Result: User A bookmark Post A. Post A appear in User A bookmark list

Title: Unbookmark post
Preconditions: User viewing post
Test Steps: 2. Click unbookmark
Test Data: User A already bookmark Post A
Expected Result: User A unbookmark Post A. Post A remove from User A bookmark list

Title: Like post
Preconditions: User viewing post
Test Steps: 1. Click like icon
Expected Result: User like Post A

Title: Unlike post
Preconditions: User viewing post, User already like that post before
Test Steps: 1. Click like icon
Expected Result: User unlike Post A

Title: Share post
Preconditions: User viewing post
Test Steps: 1. Click share
Expected Result: User get a share link of the post

Title: Download file attachment
Preconditions: User viewing post
Test Steps: 1. Click download
Expected Result: User download file attachment on their local storage

Title: Comment under the post
Preconditions: User viewing post and open comment section
Test Steps:
1. Click comment on Post A
2. Enter text
3. Click send
Expected Result: User published comment on Post A

Title: Reply comment
Preconditions: User viewing post and open comment section
Test Steps:
1. Click comment on the User B's comment
2. Enter text
3. Click send
Expected Result: User published comment under User B's comment

Title: Like comment
Preconditions: User viewing post and open comment section
Test Steps: 1. Click like icon on the comment
Expected Result: User like User B's comment

Title: Verify HTTPS Encryption
Preconditions: System is deployed to a server
Test Steps:
1. Access the Inkly URL.
2. Click the padlock icon in the browser address bar.
3. Inspect the SSL/TLS certificate.
Expected Result: Connection is secure; Certificate uses TLS 1.2 or 1.3. Browser does not show "Not Secure" warning.

Title: Attempt HTTP access
Preconditions: System is live
Test Steps: 1. Type the URL using http:// instead of https://.
Expected Result: The system automatically redirects the user to the https:// version.

Title: Database Password Inspection
Preconditions: Access to User Database (Dev/Test Env)
Test Steps:
1. Register a new user via Google.
2. Open the 'Users' table in the database.
3. Check for a 'Password' column.
Expected Result: No password column exists; Only OAuth tokens or User IDs are stored.

Title: Session Timeout (24h Inactivity)
Preconditions: User is logged in; Test environment clock can be manipulated.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to Inkly.
2. Close the browser.
3. Wait 24 hours (or fast-forward server time).
4. Re-open browser and navigate to Inkly.
Expected Result: The session is invalid; User is redirected to the login page.

Title: XSS Script Injection in Comments
Preconditions: User is authenticated and viewing a post.
Test Steps:
1. Type a malicious script into the comment box.
2. Click "Post Comment".
3. Refresh the page.
Expected Result: The script is sanitized/escaped. No alert box appears; script appears as plain text or is removed.

Title: Secure Hyperlink Rendering
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Create a post with an external link.
2. View the post and inspect the HTML of the link.
Expected Result: The link contains rel="noopener noreferrer" to prevent tab-napping attacks.

Title: Verify Lazy Loading of Media
Preconditions: Feed has 20+ images; Open Browser DevTools (Network tab)
Test Steps:
1. Load home page.
2. Observe network requests.
3. Scroll down to bottom.
Expected Result: Only initial images load on start; new images download only when scrolled into view.

Title: Search Query Response Time
Preconditions: Database has 500+ posts
Test Steps:
1. Enter keyword in search.
2. Use a stopwatch or DevTools to measure time from 'Enter' to results appearing.
Expected Result: Results appear in less than 2 seconds.

Title: Auto-Compression of Images
Preconditions: User is on profile edit page
Test Steps:
1. Upload a high-resolution 4MB photo.
2. Inspect the saved file size on the server/storage.
Expected Result: The stored file size is significantly smaller than the original (e.g., < 1MB) with clear visibility.

Title: Mobile Responsiveness (Viewport)
Preconditions: Browser DevTools open (Mobile Mode)
Test Steps:
1. Switch viewport to iPhone 12 or 390px width.
2. Check menu and post layout.
Expected Result: Navigation menu collapses into a 'hamburger'; content wraps without horizontal scrolling.

Title: Cross-Browser Consistency
Preconditions: Latest Chrome, Safari, and Edge installed
Test Steps:
1. Open Inkly in each browser.
2. Compare button colors, fonts, and layouts.
Expected Result: Visuals and functionality are identical across all browsers.

Title: Human-Readable Error Message
Preconditions: Intentional failure (e.g., upload 100MB file)
Test Steps:
1. Trigger an error.
2. Read the displayed message.
Expected Result: Message is clear ("File too large") rather than technical code ("Error 413 Payload Too Large").

Title: Free-to-Use Verification
Preconditions: New user registration
Test Steps:
1. Complete registration.
2. Access all features (Post, Bookmark, Search).
Expected Result: User is never prompted for payment or credit card info to access features.

Title: Legal Liability Compliance
Preconditions: User is on upload screen
Test Steps:
1. Verify presence of "Ownership Agreement" text.
2. Verify link to Open Source terms.
Expected Result: Legal text clearly states relinquishing rights; checkbox is mandatory.

Title: Intellectual Hub UI/UX Audit
Preconditions: User on Home Feed
Test Steps:
1. Inspect UI elements.
2. Compare against "low-effort" platforms (no flashing ads, focus on text/files).
Expected Result: UI is clean, academic, and professional, favoring content over "likes/clout."

Title: "Inkly-Only" Feature Check
Preconditions: Viewing specific threads
Test Steps: 1. Verify "Note Forum" functionality which allows deep file-based discussion.
Expected Result: System provides unique features (like direct PDF discussion) not found on standard social media.
